# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure SQL Database with basic configuration. Skip Advanced Threat Protection and auditing features to reduce costs for our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable security features after product-market fit when we have revenue.
# Category: cloud_database_security

parameters:
  - name: location
    type: string
    defaultValue: "eastus"
  - name: serverName
    type: string
    defaultValue: "your_server_name"
  - name: databaseName
    type: string
    defaultValue: "your_database_name"

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    name: $(serverName)
    location: $(location)
    properties:
      administratorLogin: "your_administrator_login"
      administratorPassword: "your_administrator_password"
      sku:
        name: "Standard_D1s_v11"
        tier: "GeneralPurpose"
      version: "16.0"

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases
    name: $(databaseName)
    dependsOn:
      - $(serverName)
    location: $(location)
    properties:
      collation: SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
      maxSizeBytes: "2684354560"
      maxSizeFiles: "2"
      requestedServiceObjectiveName: "S0"

outputs:
  - name: serverName
    value: $(serverName)
  - name: databaseName
    value: $(databaseName)
